name: rls19-test20-derived-ci-safe
provenance: repo-authored scenarios derived from Phase 17 implementation and public TEST-20 task categories

tasks.name: E1-derived-base-emission
tasks.description: Derived emission baseline using a single straight road and one receiver.

tasks.name: E2-derived-surface-correction
tasks.description: Derived surface correction scenario using OPA surface type.

tasks.name: E3-derived-gradient-correction
tasks.description: Derived gradient correction scenario with 5% road gradient.

tasks.name: E4-derived-junction-correction
tasks.description: Derived junction correction scenario with signalized intersection at 50m.

tasks.name: E5-derived-reflection-surcharge
tasks.description: Derived reflection surcharge scenario with 2.0 dB street canyon correction.

tasks.name: E6-derived-vehicle-sound-power
tasks.description: Derived single-vehicle sound power scenario with short road segment and minimal traffic.

tasks.name: E7-derived-length-related-power
tasks.description: Derived length-related sound power scenario with longer road and distant receiver.

tasks.name: I1-derived-immission-reference
tasks.description: Derived immission reference setting with a shielding barrier and coarser segment length.

tasks.name: I1-derived-immission-check
tasks.description: Derived immission check setting with the same geometry and finer deterministic segmentation.

tasks.name: K5-derived-reflection-conditions
tasks.description: Derived reflection-condition task with a single explicit reflector.
